name: Marquee Ticker
description: A single-section motion ticker with three variants — large editorial words, customer logos, or pill badges. 1-3 rows can scroll independently in opposite directions, with optional edge fades and three tone surfaces.

descriptions.descriptive: Full-bleed scrolling row(s) under an optional eyebrow / headline. Variant 'words' renders large editorial text (clamp from 2.25rem to 5rem) separated by bullets; 'logos' renders translucent customer logos; 'badges' renders rounded pill tags that scroll across one or two rows in alternating directions. Edge fades clip the page-edge padding. Animations halt cleanly when prefers-reduced-motion is set.
descriptions.usage: Use as a visual breath between content sections — list capabilities, signal scale via logos, or surface a tech/skill stack. Place between a hero and the first content block, or between a stats section and a closing CTA. Don't co-locate with the marquee-style hero variants.
descriptions.audienceFit: Editorial-leaning brands, agencies, B2B SaaS announcing partner integrations, conferences with sponsor recognition, and any segment whose 'we do many things' deserves a moving rather than gridded display.
